The Artist

Sadie Lee is the kind of voice that stops a room cold and keeps it there until the last note fades.

Based out of Anna, Texas, Sadie blends country grit, blues soul, rock edge, and jazz sensibility into a sound that's entirely her own — raw enough to feel real, polished enough to fill any room she walks into.

Her career started at age four, acting on film sets and performing on theatre stages from Los Angeles to Texas. That foundation gave her something most artists spend years chasing: stage presence that feels earned, not rehearsed.

Country Blues Rock Jazz Full Band

"A voice that demands your attention —
and keeps it."
